title: Madalena
actors: Aliki Vougiouklaki, Dimitris Papamichael, Pantelis Zervos
plot: A tenacious daughter and an expert boatman are more than eager to prolong their parents' irreconcilable feud. However, an untimely demise will only make things worse. Can a humble priest help them bury the hatchet and, maybe, find...
